name: E-1 severity override: tuple severity with the wrong array length is rejected because §16 E-1 mandates a 2-tuple of [severity, options]
command:
printf 'rules:
  g-ts-001:
    - error
    - allow_with_comment: false
    - options: noise
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'array_length=3' err.txt && grep -q 'expected_length=2' err.txt && echo arity_enforced 1>&2
